plan.failureSummary: The survey submission failed because the name input was not filled, triggering a 'Name is required' validation error. This happened because deterministic mode used stale cached selectors containing dynamic Radix UI IDs (e.g., '#\\:rj\\:-form-item') which changed on this run, leading to selector drift and a failed submission step.

remediationSteps.summary: Clear Page AI cache and retry the automation
remediationSteps.details: Clear the Page AI cache and re-run the test. This forces Page.ai to perform fresh autonomous element discovery rather than relying on stale cached dynamic IDs.

remediationSteps.summary: Configure selectors to ignore dynamic ID attributes
remediationSteps.details: If persistent selectors are defined or cached, configure the locator generation or page.ai parameters to prioritize stable attributes (like 'name', 'placeholder', or label text association) over transient React/Radix dynamic IDs.

plan.notes: Dynamic Radix UI IDs (like :rj:, :rk:) generated by React are unstable across runs. Since deterministic mode was active, it attempted to use these stale IDs, missing the Name field and failing to proceed past the first page. Clearing the Page AI cache will force the model to re-resolve the selectors dynamically and succeed.
